name: @lenne.tech/nest-server
description: Modern, fast, powerful Node.js web framework in TypeScript based on Nest with a GraphQL API and a connection to MongoDB (or other databases).
author: lenne.Tech <info@lenne.tech> (https://lenne.tech)

scripts.build: rimraf dist && nest build && pnpm run build:copy-types && pnpm run build:copy-templates && pnpm run build:add-type-references && pnpm run build:framework-api
scripts.build:pack: pnpm pack && echo 'use file:/ROOT_PATH_TO_TGZ_FILE to integrate the package'
scripts.check: pnpm audit && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.check:fix: pnpm install && pnpm audit --fix && pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.check:naf: pnpm install && pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.docs: pnpm run docs:ci && open http://127.0.0.1:8080/ && open ./public/index.html && compodoc -p tsconfig.json -s
scripts.docs:ci: ts-node ./scripts/init-server.ts && pnpm run docs:bootstrap && compodoc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.reinit: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm install && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:ci && pnpm run build
scripts.reinit:clean: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune && pnpm install && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run build
scripts.reinit:force: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune && pnpm install --force && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.reinit:legacy: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune && pnpm install && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:ci
scripts.test:cleanup: find tests -type f \( -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.bin' \) -not -name '.gitkeep' -delete && echo 'Test artifacts cleaned up'

//overrides.axios@<1.16.0: Security: Multiple CVEs in axios <1.15.2 (SSRF via NO_PROXY, prototype pollution, header injection, CRLF injection in form-data, XSRF leakage, auth bypass, response tampering, no_proxy IP alias bypass, streamed upload/response bypass, toFormData DoS, null byte injection) - transitive via @getbrevo/brevo and node-mailjet. Remove when @getbrevo/brevo and node-mailjet ship axios>=1.16.0
//overrides.fast-uri@<3.1.2: Security: host confusion (GHSA-3vp4-mxqf-vmh4) and path traversal (GHSA-q4mq-mw7v-xq57) in fast-uri <3.1.2 - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc>@angular-devkit/schematics>@angular-devkit/core>ajv
//overrides.@babel/plugin-transform-modules-systemjs: Security: prototype pollution-based variable shadowing (GHSA-7p7r-hpq8-6w8q) generates unsafe code - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc>@babel/preset-env
//overrides.minimatch@>=10.0.0 <10.2.5: Security: RegExp DoS - transitive via @nestjs/apollo>ts-morph>@ts-morph/common and nodemon
//overrides.brace-expansion@<1.1.13: Security: RegExp DoS - transitive via eslint>minimatch
//overrides.brace-expansion@>=4.0.0 <5.0.6: Security: RegExp DoS - Large numeric range defeats brace expansion (GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2) - transitive via nodemon>minimatch and @ts-morph/common>minimatch and @compodoc/compodoc>glob>minimatch
//overrides.picomatch@>=4.0.0 <4.0.4: Security: ReDoS - transitive via vitest and vite
//overrides.kysely@>=0.26.0 <0.28.17: Security: JSON-path traversal injection via unsanitized input (SQL injection) - transitive via better-auth>@better-auth/passkey>@better-auth/core
//overrides.@protobufjs/utf8@<=1.1.0: Security: overlong UTF-8 decoding - transitive via @apollo/server>@apollo/usage-reporting-protobuf
//overrides.ws@>=8.0.0 <8.20.1: Security: Uninitialized memory disclosure (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx) - transitive via @nestjs/graphql
//overrides.qs@>=6.11.1 <=6.15.1: Security: remotely triggerable DoS in qs.stringify with comma-format arrays (GHSA-q8mj-m7cp-5q26) - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc>body-parser
//overrides.lodash@>=4.0.0 <4.18.0: Security: CVE in lodash@4.17.x - transitive via @nestjs/graphql. 4.18.1 is the latest patched version
//overrides.defu@<=6.1.6: Security: prototype pollution via __proto__ key - transitive via better-auth
//overrides.follow-redirects@<=1.15.11: Security: Custom Authentication Headers leak on cross-domain redirect (GHSA-r4q5-vmmm-2653) - transitive via axios>@getbrevo/brevo and axios>node-mailjet
//overrides.uuid@<14.0.0: Security: Missing buffer bounds check in v3/v5/v6 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq) - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc and @compodoc/compodoc>@compodoc/live-server>http-auth
//overrides.postcss@<8.5.10: Security: XSS via Unescaped </style> in CSS Stringify Output (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) - transitive via vite. Remove when vite ships with postcss>=8.5.10

pnpm.//peerDependencyRules: allowedVersions: deps lag behind our newer majors (graphql-upload wants @types/express@^4, the deprecated apollo playground plugin wants @apollo/server@^4) — both work with our v5. ignoreMissing: browser-only vis-network peers pulled in transitively via yuml-diagram (server-side UML generation never renders, so these are not needed).
